response.justification: Nearly two decades of full-stack experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js core, recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matching a distinctive requirement, plus solid testing culture (TDD, test-library authorship), MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes exposure. Frontend depth leans toward Ember rather than React, and Nest.js and Kotlin are not evidenced, but the overall profile comfortably clears the senior IC bar for this role.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js full-stack experience well beyond the 6-year requirement
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience, a rare direct match
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks)
concerns: React exposure appears limited; frontend history is mostly Ember.js
No evidence of Nest.js or Kotlin experience
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly listed despite broad testing background
